items.name: deep-research
items.title: Deep Research
items.description: In-depth research agent for topics that need comprehensive, multi-source investigation with citations. Use when the user asks to research a topic thoroughly, gather and synthesize information from across the web, compare approaches or options, fact-check a claim against primary sources, or produce a sourced writeup or literature scan. For example, "research the current state of WebGPU adoption", "compare Postgres vs SQLite for an offline-first app, with sources", or "what does the evidence say about X, and where do experts disagree?"
items.author: Khaled Saeed
